baseline.problem: Archive/resume regression loses or strands pending messages when canonical session id changes, and the web client continues operating on old session route/cache.
focus_metrics: pending messages survive old-id -> new-id merge
/resume and POST /messages return consistent authoritative sessionId semantics
send after archive continues chat on canonical session
route/query/message-window stay consistent when old session is removed
gating_commands: cd hub && bun test src/store/pendingMessages.test.ts src/resume/autoResumeOrchestrator.test.ts src/resume/autoResumeOrchestrator.integration.test.ts src/web/routes/messages.test.ts src/web/routes/sessions.test.ts
baseline.preflight_note: Current repository baseline may already fail typecheck; treat preflight as informational and use targeted gating commands for regression scope.

success_signals: No pending_messages row is deleted or stranded solely because mergeSessions removed the old session id.
Frontend rebind is driven by authoritative sessionId from backend responses and survives session-removed ordering.
Regression tests explicitly cover oldSessionId != resumedSessionId and route-level inactive-send contract.
